title: Room: The Mystery
overview: Room - The Mystery is a story about Kunal and his friends who meet with an accident grievously injuring a woman and a child, while driving under the influence of alcohol. The woman then returns as a ghost to take revenge from all those who were responsible for her and her children's death.
